SEARCH
Package model

Class PlayerModel

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
model.Entity
model.Character
model.PlayerModel
public class PlayerModel extends Character
Class to model the model of the player. Singleton pattern is used. This class is the real Observable.
Author:
Scarselli Ilaria, matricola 1918975

    • getInstance

      public static PlayerModel getInstance()
      Public getter for the instance of the PlayerModel class. Returns the instance if present, otherwise it creates it using the private constructor

    • getBomberMan

      public static int getBomberMan()
      Getter for the number of of BomberMan-lives. Each one of them is three heart-lives
      Returns:
      the BomberMan-lives
